name: Clear-Act: primary supplier 60-day shutdown + 2 GOLD customers at risk + reliable alternative
rubric_notes: Primary supplier effectively down (60-day delay). 16h to stockout. ReliablePartners has LOW uncertainty, 4-day lead, 12% premium — the obvious right answer. Two GOLD customers at risk; the stockout would breach the first deadline (20h) by hours. Severity CRITICAL via the <24h-stockout rule. Confidence HIGH if the Arbiter integrates the customer-deadline pressure correctly; MEDIUM is defensible if a Skeptic argues that two GOLDs (no PLATINUMs) is borderline.
